ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pumps" (
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pump type */,
  "pump_type" TEXT /* Type of the pump (e.g., Continuous bucket pump) */,
  "cyclic_continuous" TEXT /* Indicates whether the pump operates cyclically or continuously */,
  "max_lift_height" TEXT /* Maximum height the pump can lift water */,
  "production_cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the production of the pump */,
  "efficiency" TEXT /* Efficiency rating of the pump */,
  "output" TEXT /* Output capacity of the pump */,
  "size_of_device" TEXT /* Size of the device */,
  "fabrication_requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for fabricating the pump */,
  "difficulty_of_production" TEXT /* Difficulty level of producing the pump */,
  "durability" TEXT /* Durability rating of the pump */,
  "difficulty_of_repair" TEXT /* Difficulty level of repairing the pump */,
  "suction_lift" TEXT /* Indicates if the pump has suction lift capability */,
  "operating_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the pump is typically used */,
  "material_composition" TEXT /* Materials used in the pump's construction */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period provided for the pump */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications and standards the pump meets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pump_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pumps_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the manufacturer's website */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was established */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees at the manufacturer */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialized areas of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pump_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pump model */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated pump type */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the pump model */,
  "year_introduced" INTEGER /* Year the model was introduced */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Specifications for the pump model */,
  "operating_temperature_range" TEXT /* Range of temperatures the pump can operate in */,
  "operating_pressure_range" TEXT /* Range of pressures the pump can handle */,
  "power_source" TEXT /* Type of power source */,
  "noise_level" TEXT /* Noise level produced by the pump */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the pump model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pump_models_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pump_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sold pump model */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of pumps sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price per unit */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sale was made */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the pump to the customer */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "sales_representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who made the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pump_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pump_sales_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES pump_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pump_sales_sales_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_representative_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the customer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the customer operates in */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the customer's company */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the customer's company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the customer's company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pump_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the maintenance activity in minutes */,
  "maintenance_technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is scheduled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pump_maintenance_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pump_maintenance_maintenance_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_technician_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repair_logs" (
  "repair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repair record */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump being repaired */,
  "repair_date" TEXT /* Date of the repair activity */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue being repaired */,
  "repair_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the repair */,
  "repair_type" TEXT /* Type of repair */,
  "repaired_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who performed the repair */,
  "parts_used" TEXT /* List of parts used during the repair */,
  "downtime" INTEGER /* Downtime in hours due to the repair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repair_logs_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pump_suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of components supplied */,
  "quality_rating" TEXT /* Quality rating of the supplier's components */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for component delivery in days */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier from whom the components were ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "components_ordered" TEXT /* Details of the components ordered */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES pump_suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated pump model */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification */,
  "specification_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the specification value */,
  "specification_category" TEXT /* Category of the specification */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the specification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_specifications_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES pump_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pump_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pump model tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance test */,
  "flow_rate" REAL /* Flow rate achieved during the test */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure achieved during the test */,
  "efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Efficiency rating of the pump during the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the performance test was conducted */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the performance test in minutes */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the performance test */,
  "test_conducted_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who conducted the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pump_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES pump_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pump_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance standard */,
  "pump_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated pump type */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the standard */,
  "standard_type" TEXT /* Type of standard */,
  "certifying_body" TEXT /* Body that issued the standard */,
  "validity_period" TEXT /* Period of validity for the standard */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when the pump was last checked for compliance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pump_standards_pump_id FOREIGN KEY ("pump_id") REFERENCES pumps ("pump_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, technician) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Last time the user changed their password */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the action failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
